member.name: T:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.HandleUpdate
member.summary:
Handler for an OnUpdate event.
The update is performed on a temporary instance, which, shortly after this handler is invoked, will be applied to the prefab.
The event handler can make changes to any objects in the hierarchy rooted by the updatedInstance. Those changes will be applied to the prefab.
The updatedObjects include all objects in the temporary instance that were: - created, or - changed parent, or - had a component that was created, destroyed, or updated. There is no notification for entire objects that were destroyed.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab
member.summary:
This component is applied to a prefab. It keeps the prefab sync'd up with an FBX file.
Other parts of the ecosystem: FbxPrefabInspector FbxPrefabAutoUpdater

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab.m_fbxHistory
member.summary: Representation of the FBX file as it was when the prefab was last saved. This lets us update the prefab when the FBX changes.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab.m_fbxModel
member.summary: Which FBX file does this refer to?

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab.m_autoUpdate
member.summary: Should we auto-update this prefab when the FBX file is updated?

member.name: E:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab.OnUpdate
member.summary: OnUpdate is raised once when an FbxPrefab gets updated, after all the changes have been done.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab.CallOnUpdate(UnityEngine.Formats.Fbx.Exporter.FbxPrefab,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.GameObject})
member.summary: Notify listeners that they're free to make adjustments. This will be called after the FbxPrefab auto updater has completed it's work.
